title: WooCommerce
description: The world's most popular open-source e-commerce platform, built as a WordPress plugin to turn any WordPress site into a fully featured online store.
installation: WooCommerce is a WordPress plugin, so this template runs the official wordpress image (PHP/Apache) and you install WooCommerce from inside wp-admin. WordPress requires MySQL/MariaDB (it does not support PostgreSQL), so the mariadb add-on is shipped. First run: complete the WordPress install wizard, then in wp-admin go to Plugins > Add New, search 'WooCommerce', install + activate, and run the WooCommerce setup wizard (store address, currency, payment, shipping). Rotate the MariaDB password and all eight WORDPRESS_AUTH_KEY/SALT secrets (openssl rand -base64 64) before production. WP_HOME/WP_SITEURL are pinned to the app URL so checkout and admin URLs resolve. Persistent data (wp-content: plugins incl. WooCommerce, themes, uploads/product images) lives on the mounted volume at /var/www/html. For email (order receipts) configure an SMTP plugin; for payments add a gateway plugin (Stripe/PayPal).
